== Notes for [[Item:Q105619|Q105619]] ==

[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Judah_IV '''Yehuda IV רבי יהודה הרביעי''']

Judah IV (or Nesi'ah III) held the office of Nasi of the ancient Jewish Sanhedrin between 380/5 and 400 CE, following Gamaliel V. He was succeeded by Gamaliel VI, the last occupant of the office.

*Preceded by Gamaliel V Nasi
*Sanhedrin president: 380/5 CE—400 CE
*Succeeded by Gamaliel VI

*<nowiki>------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</nowiki>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000010960383908

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
